# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK/builddir
# It was generated by CMake: /cm/shared/apps/cmake/3.17.1/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Format of archive to build if PACKAGE_TYPE is set to ARCHIVE.
//  Valid values: TBZ2, TGZ, ZIP, 7Z, TXZ, STGZ
ARCHIVE_FORMAT:STRING=TBZ2

//If PACKAGE_TYPE is set to ARCHIVE, this controls whether or not
// to build all components of Amber into the same package.  If
// false, they'll be split into a few different archives.
ARCHIVE_MONOLITHIC:BOOL=ON

BLAS_Accelerate_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=BLAS_Accelerate_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

BLAS_acml_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=BLAS_acml_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Type of build.  Controls debugging information and optimizations.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=RELEASE

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//Allowed build types for Amber.  This only controls debugging
// flags, set the OPTIMIZE variable to control compiler optimizations.
CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES:STRING=DEBUG;RELEASE

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/cm/local/apps/gcc/11.2.0/bin/gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/cm/local/apps/gcc/11.2.0/bin/gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/cm/local/apps/gcc/11.2.0/bin/gcc-ar

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

CUDA:BOOL=TRUE

//Compile device code in 64 bit mode

//Attach the build rule to the CUDA source file.  Enable only when

//Generate and parse .cubin files in Device mode.

//Build in Emulation mode
CUDA_BUILD_EMULATION:BOOL=OFF

FORCE_EXTERNAL_LIBS:STRING=

INSTALL_WRAPPED:BOOL=ON

MKL_STATIC:BOOL=OFF

//Build quick with MPI inter-machine parallelization support.
MPI:BOOL=TRUE

//Executable for running MPI programs.
MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/home/liz7/beegfs/liz7/openmpi/bin/mpiexec

//Maximum number of processors available to run MPI applications.
MPIEXEC_MAX_NUMPROCS:STRING=64

//Flag used by MPI to specify the number of processes for mpiexec;
// the next option will be the number of processes.
MPIEXEC_NUMPROC_FLAG:STRING=-n

//These flags will be placed after all flags passed to mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_POSTFLAGS:STRING=

//These flags will be directly before the executable that is being
// run by mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_PREFLAGS:STRING=

//MPI CXX additional include directories
MPI_CXX_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//MPI compiler for CXX
MPI_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/home/liz7/beegfs/liz7/openmpi/bin/mpicxx

//MPI CXX compiler wrapper include directories
MPI_CXX_COMPILER_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/include

//MPI CXX compilation definitions
MPI_CXX_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS:STRING=

//MPI CXX compilation options
MPI_CXX_COMPILE_OPTIONS:STRING=-pthread

//Path to a file.
MPI_CXX_HEADER_DIR:PATH=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/include

//MPI CXX libraries to link against
MPI_CXX_LIB_NAMES:STRING=mpi

//MPI CXX linker flags
MPI_CXX_LINK_FLAGS:STRING=-Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/liz7/beegfs/liz7/openmpi/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -pthread

//If true, the MPI-2 C++ bindings are disabled using definitions.
MPI_CXX_SKIP_MPICXX:BOOL=FALSE

//MPI C additional include directories
MPI_C_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=

//MPI compiler for C
MPI_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/home/liz7/beegfs/liz7/openmpi/bin/mpicc

//MPI C compiler wrapper include directories

MPI_C_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS:STRING=

//MPI C compilation options
MPI_C_COMPILE_OPTIONS:STRING=-pthread

MPI_C_HEADER_DIR:PATH=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/include

//MPI Fortran compilation options

//MPI Fortran linker flags
MPI_Fortran_LINK_FLAGS:STRING=-Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/liz7/beegfs/liz7/openmpi/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -pthread

MPI_Fortran_MODULE_DIR:PATH=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/lib

MPI_mpi_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so

//Location of the mpi_mpifh library for MPI
MPI_mpi_mpifh_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/lib/libmpi_mpifh.so

//Location of the mpi_usempi_ignore_tkr library for MPI
MPI_mpi_usempi_ignore_tkr_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/lib/libmpi_usempi_ignore_tkr.so

//Location of the mpi_usempif08 library for MPI
MPI_mpi_usempif08_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/mnt/beegfs/merzk/liz7/openmpi/lib/libmpi_usempif08.so

//Whether to build code with compiler flags for optimization.
OPTIMIZE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//CXX compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp;pthread

//C compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_C_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//C compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_C_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp;pthread

//Fortran compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_Fortran_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//Fortran compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_Fortran_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp;pthread

//Path to a library.
OpenMP_gomp_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/cm/local/apps/gcc/11.2.0/lib64/libgomp.so

//Path to a library.
OpenMP_pthread_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/lib64/libpthread.so

//Type of package to build when the package target is run.  See
// the wiki page on creating packages for details.
PACKAGE_TYPE:STRING=ARCHIVE

//Print a report showing data which will help you package quick.
PRINT_PACKAGING_REPORT:BOOL=OFF

//Compiles a debug version of QUICK with extra prints enabled.
QUICK_DEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//Compiles a debug version of QUICK that reports more information
// on timing
QUICK_DEBUG_TIME:BOOL=OFF

//Specify QUICK gpu architecture. Applicable for cuda and cudampi
// versions only. If empty, QUICK will be compiled for several
// architectures based on the CUDA toolkit version.
QUICK_USER_ARCH:STRING=volta

//Enable verbose output from CUDA's ptxas.
QUICK_VERBOSE_PTXAS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
RPMBUILD_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/rpmbuild

//Optimize for the SSE family of vectorizations.
SSE:BOOL=TRUE

//CPU types for which auto-dispatch code will be produced (Intel
// compilers version 11 and higher). Known valid
//\n	options are SSE2, SSE3, SSSE3, SSE4.1 and SSE4.2. Multiple
// options (comma separated) are permitted.
SSE_TYPES:STRING=

//If true, build static libraries and freestanding (except for
// data files) executables. Otherwise, compile common code into
// shared libraries and link them to programs. The runtime path
// is set properly now, so unless you move the installation AND
// don't source amber.sh you won't have to mess with LD_LIBRARY
// PATH
STATIC:BOOL=OFF

//If true, Amber will use all found system libraries, even if they
// are considered problematic by the Amber developers
TRUST_SYSTEM_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable warnings about uninitialized variables.  Kind of clutters
// up the build output, but these need to be fixed.
UNINITIALIZED_WARNINGS:BOOL=ON

//Enable warnings about unused variables.  Really clutters up the
// build output.
UNUSED_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to use the Fastest Fourier Transform in the West library
// and build RISM and the PBSA FFT solver.
USE_FFT:BOOL=ON

//Enable warnings.
WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to the wget program.  Used to download files.
WGET:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/wget

//Value Computed by CMake
quick_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK/builddir

//Value Computed by CMake
quick_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/liz7/isilon/Zhen/QUICK
